paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is currently 6.64, representing a decrease of 0.23% from the prior close and 26.03% over the past 22 sessions.

The recent news headlines include announcements of Fermi's second quarter 2026 earnings release and call date, set for August 13, 2026, as well as discussions about the stock's price and potential value. There have been no new news articles in the last 24 hours.

There have been several recent SEC filings, including an 8-K/A form disclosing the resignation of director Miles Everson and an 8-K form announcing the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031. Additionally, there has been one new social post in the last 24 hours, mentioning the arrival of Siemens turbines at the Port of Houston.
